DashboardWorkspacesProjectsPeopleMessagesNetworkStudioCalendarStorageKnowledgeTemplatesSettings

Settings

Settings

Control privacy, roles, notifications and how the OS behaves.

Platform setupModules

Workspace defaults

Privacy by defaultNew workspaces are hidden unless switched to Showcase.
On
Project-only guestsGuests only see assigned work.
On
CORE uses OS data firstSearch your work before generic answers.
On

Workspace Modules

Turn optional tools on or off per workspace. Each module uses the same permissions, notifications, activity, assets, search and CORE engine.

Appearance

Choose a calm, curated look. The layout stays locked so the OS remains clear and professional.

Focus Mode

Collapse distractions when you need to work on one thing. Shortcut: Ctrl + Shift + F.

Backend foundation

Supabase is now the database/storage/auth foundation. Open Platform setup to add public API keys and test login.


Open platform setup

v2.5 Theme Engine

Local
ThemeMatch the website and OS visual language.
DensityChoose comfortable or compact workspace spacing.
Command paletteUse Ctrl / Cmd + K anywhere in Sorro OS.
